title: Visiblity on blocked tasks
excerpt: Hi, My team uses dependancies as a way of know whether a task can be assigned for the following week. I’m looking for a way to see if a task is blocked by a dependancy on the board view.  Currently the issue is that whil…

posts.author: Yossi (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, My team uses dependancies as a way of know whether a task can be assigned for the following week. I’m looking for a way to see if a task is blocked by a dependancy on the board view. Currently the issue is that while you can see a task has a dependancy you cannot tell the status of that dependant task without clicking into it.
Thanks

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Yossi ,
There is a way to see if a task is blocked by a dependency on the board view in monday.com. To do this, you will need to add the Dependency Column to your board. This column will show you the status of all of the tasks that a given task is dependent on.

If you need any implementation support kindly contact us

posts.author: Yossi (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, this does not happen on my board., can you provide me with a screenshot showing the status in the dependancy column?

Thanks
